headline: Will Monster Beverage (MNST) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Monster Beverage (MNST) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: 3 Quality Compounders to Keep an Eye On
summary: Quality compounders are well-oiled machines. Their competitive advantages allow them to make profits consistently and reinvest them into projects that generate even more profits, creating a virtuous cycle of returns.
